query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS legal_contracts (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  title VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  type ENUM('employment', 'vendor', 'client', 'partnership', 'nda', 'lease') NOT NULL,
  parties JSON,
  start_date DATE,
  end_date DATE,
  value DECIMAL(15,2),
  status ENUM('draft', 'review', 'active', 'expired', 'terminated') DEFAULT 'draft',
  signed_date DATE,
  document_url VARCHAR(500),
  INDEX idx_type (type),
  INDEX idx_status (status)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS compliance_requirements (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  name VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  category ENUM('federal', 'state', 'local', 'industry') NOT NULL,
  description TEXT,
  due_date DATE,
  frequency ENUM('one_time', 'monthly', 'quarterly', 'annual') NOT NULL,
  status ENUM('pending', 'in_progress', 'completed', 'overdue') DEFAULT 'pending',
  responsible_party INT,
  INDEX idx_category (category),
  INDEX idx_status (status)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS tech_assets (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  name VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  type ENUM('hardware', 'software', 'service', 'license') NOT NULL,
  vendor VARCHAR(255),
  purchase_date DATE,
  expiry_date DATE,
  cost DECIMAL(15,2),
  recurring_cost DECIMAL(15,2),
  status ENUM('active', 'maintenance', 'retired') DEFAULT 'active',
  assigned_to INT,
  INDEX idx_type (type),
  INDEX idx_status (status)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS system_integrations (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  name VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  type ENUM('api', 'database', 'file_transfer', 'webhook') NOT NULL,
  source_system VARCHAR(255),
  target_system VARCHAR(255),
  status ENUM('active', 'inactive', 'error') DEFAULT 'active',
  last_sync DATETIME,
  frequency ENUM('realtime', 'hourly', 'daily', 'weekly') NOT NULL,
  INDEX idx_status (status)
);
